data.title: Precisely Automate Achieves SAP Clean Core Certification for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
data.description: Precisely, a global leader in data integrity, recently unveiled a new certification that allows organizations to automate high-volume SAP data processes. This innovation ensures upgrade safety and alignment with SAP's Clean Core strategy. The announcement was made on April 28, 2026, in Burlington, Massachusetts. Through this certification, organizations can streamline their SAP data operations and enhance efficiency.

data.title: Fatty15 Co-Founder, Dr. Stephanie Venn-Watson, Named 2026 LA Times Life Sciences Visionary
data.description: Seraphina Therapeutics, based in San Diego, has recently gained scientific recognition for uncovering an emerging nutritional deficiency syndrome linked to C15:0. The discovery, made during efforts to enhance the health of aging Navy dolphins, showcases the importance of addressing this condition. The findings were announced on April 28, 2026, shedding light on the significance of this breakthrough in the field of nutrition and health.

data.title: BusRight Launches Behind The Wheel Award, Donating 300 Tablets to Winning School District
data.description: Starting today until May 28, school or district leaders nationwide have the opportunity to nominate a driver in celebration of National School Bus Driver Appreciation Day. The event is being held in New York on April 28, 2026. BusRight, a prominent all-in-one transportation solution provider, is facilitating the initiative.

data.description: The company continues to uphold operational and financial discipline amidst a challenging consumption landscape. Despite high interest rates and family...SÃO PAULO, 28th April 2026 -- Progress has been made in exploring new growth opportunities and evolving the business model.

data.title: Vets Pets Expands Wilson Veterinary Hospital with Additional Location
data.description: An announcement was made by Vets Pets, a cooperative network of veterinary hospitals in North Carolina, regarding the opening of Wilson Veterinary Hospital - West in Wilson, NC on Raleigh Road Parkway West in the summer of 2026. This new location will be the second home for the organization and will expand its services.

data.title: Monarch Quantum and Oratomic Announce Quantum Computing Partnership to Accelerate Utility-Scale, Fault-Tolerant Systems by the End of the Decade
data.description: Monarch Quantum and Oratomic have recently announced a strategic collaboration aimed at combining photonic systems and neutral atom architectures to create fault-tolerant, utility-scale quantum computers. This partnership is set to produce systems with tens of thousands of physical qubits, marking a significant advancement in quantum computing technology.

data.title: LiqTech Expands Commercial Pool Business Through Strategic Partnership with Lotec and Secures Largest QlariFlow™ Pool Project to Date
data.description: In Ballerup, Denmark, on April 28, 2026, LiqTech International, Inc. (NASDAQ: LIQT), a company focused on advanced ceramic filtration solutions in the clean technology sector, reported a new partnership for its Commercial Pool division. The collaboration is with Lotec, a leader in commercial pool engineering and water treatment solutions. This move showcases LiqTech's strategic efforts in expanding its reach within the industry.

data.title: LPL Financial Launches Military Deployment Practice Continuation Program
data.description: LPL has introduced a new initiative to aid qualified affiliated financial advisors in the U.S. Armed Forces who are activated for duty. The support system is designed to assist these advisors during their service, offering resources and assistance as needed.  It aims to provide essential support to advisors affiliated with LPL, ensuring they can fulfill their duty commitments without being burdened by financial or administrative concerns. This framework serves as a testament to LPL's dedication to the well-being of their advisors, with a focus on those serving in the military.

data.title: Tenable Accelerates Exposure Management Adoption with New Flexible Pricing for the AI Era
data.description: A novel model has been introduced to address obstacles to adoption, offering a predictable spending structure, expedited time-to-value, and the versatility to scale across the modern attack surface. This innovative approach aims to streamline the adoption process and improve efficiency for users.

data.title: Fort Myers Real Estate: Ellis Team Releases Q2 2026 Market Spread Index™ (MSI) Data, Revealing the "Invisible Listings" Trap for Local Sellers
data.description: In Fort Myers, Florida, on April 28, 2026, the Ellis Team at Keller Williams Realty Fort Myers & The Islands unveiled its Q2 2026 local market data amid a changing Southwest Florida housing market. The report addresses a period of selective stabilization and emphasizes key trends.

data.title: Allied Gold Confirms Normal Course Conduct of Business and Provides Update on Ongoing Approvals Process Relating to Zijin Gold Transaction
data.description: Allied Gold has officially confirmed that their business operations are continuing as usual. They have also given an update on the progress of obtaining approvals for the Zijin Gold transaction. It is reported that all essential processes are being followed diligently. The deal with Zijin Gold involves a substantial amount of money, with the total value reaching [insert specific amount]. The company is currently in the process of fulfilling all necessary requirements to proceed with the transaction smoothly.

data.title: US imposes erratic sanctions on Russia and Iran amid fluctuating oil prices in a changing economic battlefield.
data.description: The current administration under President Trump has implemented sanctions on Russia and Iran in a somewhat disorganized manner, primarily driven by concerns regarding oil prices.

data.title: RFG Advisory Appoints Mark Gilbert and Jim Patrick to Board, Makes Strategic Investment in Zocks
data.description: An announcement was made today by RFG Advisory (“RFG”), a pioneering wealth management company based in Birmingham, Alabama, regarding the appointment of new members to its board of directors. Mark Gilbert, the co-founder and CEO of Zocks Communications (“Zocks”), and Jim Patrick, a veteran in the financial services sector, have been named to the board. This move is expected to enhance RFG’s platform by combining significant investment expertise with ongoing progress. The addition of Gilbert and Patrick reflects RFG’s commitment to supporting independent financial Advisors in expanding their businesses without constraints.

data.title: New Cornerstone Advisors Research Reveals Why U.S. Banks and Credit Unions Still Struggle to Prove Marketing ROI
data.description: Today, in Scottsdale, Arizona, Cornerstone Advisors unveiled its newest research report on April 28, 2026. The report focuses on "The Marketing ROI Gap in Banking" and highlights insights for banks, credit unions, and fintech firms. Cornerstone Advisors is recognized as a top provider of consulting services in business and technology within the financial industry.

data.title: LPL Financial Welcomes Advisor Greg Selg
data.description: A recent announcement from LPL Financial LLC revealed that Greg Selg, MBA, has officially become a part of LPL Financial's broker-dealer and Registered Investment Advisor (RIA) platform. Selg brings with him a substantial amount of experience, having managed around $260 million in advisory, brokerage, and retirement plan assets. Prior to joining LPL, he was associated with Osaic.

data.title: House Doctors Brings Home Improvement Expertise to National TV on Designing Spaces
data.description: A well-known home improvement and handyman services brand, House Doctors, which is a part of Premium Service Brands (PSB), has revealed beneficial advice to assist homeowners in enhancing their living spaces. Located in Charlottesville, Va., the brand shared these practical tips on April 28, 2026.

data.title: RKD Group, GivingTuesday and Positive Equation Launch Second-Annual Monthly Giving Awareness Week
data.description: The second annual Monthly Giving Awareness Week is set to take place from May 11 to 15, 2026, as announced by RKD Group, GivingTuesday, and Positive Equation in Dallas on April 28, 2026. This initiative aims to unite nonprofit professionals and experts to drive forward the importance of regular giving.
